rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.0405 governs amendment of campaign finance semiannual reports. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 254.0405. AMENDMENT OF FILED REPORT. (a) A person who files a semiannual report under this chapter may amend the report.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
